title: SZEMÉLYES WORKSHOPOK, MINT A MEZŐGAZDASÁGI ÜZEMEK JÁRVÁNYVÉDELMÉNEK MEGVALÓSÍTÁSÁT TÁMOGATÓ INTÉZKEDÉSEK
description: A factsheet presenting in-person workshops as supporting measures to implement biosecurity on poultry farms under the NetPoulSafe project. These workshops targeted farm owners, managers, and advisors, improving their skills and motivation by covering topics such as internal and external biosecurity, regulatory requirements, and the Biocheck.UGent scoring system.
